reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atención del playero, 25 minutos esperando, y atendia a autos que recién llegaban, cuando se lo dije me contestó mal "tengo que atender en los dos lados me vas a tener que esperar" cuando el del otro lado ACABABA DE LLEGAR! Un DESASTRE no vuelvo más

(Translated by Google)
The service from the beach attendant was a disaster. I had to wait 25 minutes, and he was serving cars that had just arrived. When I told him, he responded rudely, "I have to serve on both sides, you'll have to wait for me," when the one on the other side had just arrived! A DISASTER. I won't be back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15333153301133697225/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1X0lXRXZnRRAB
